column1:
# So sanh goi gia

Neu doanh nghiep can quan ly lead va co 5-10 nhan su ban hang, goi Growth la phu hop.
Neu can bao mat cao, nhieu chi nhanh, va tich hop ERP, goi Enterprise la lua chon tot hon.
Neu chi can theo doi co ban va ngan sach han che, bat dau voi goi Starter.

# Bang gia san pham CRM AI

Goi Starter: 499000 VND/thang, toi da 3 nguoi dung.
Goi Growth: 1499000 VND/thang, toi da 15 nguoi dung, co dashboard nang cao.
Goi Enterprise: lien he de bao gia, co SSO va tich hop API.

Khach hang dang ky 12 thang duoc giam 15 phan tram.
Khach hang moi duoc dung thu 14 ngay.
